Section Title: Aditya Birla Sun Life Mutual Fund suspends fresh subscription in its 3 international funds
Content:
iStock ABSL MF Halts fresh subscriptions, revises SIP/STP & Liquid Fund Minimums.
Synopsis
Aditya Birla Sun Life Mutual Fund suspends fresh subscriptions in three international funds from 7 Oct 2025, revises minimum SIP/STP and Liquid Fund application amounts, while existing plans continue unaffected.
By [SURBHI KHANNA](https://m.economictimes.com/etreporter/author-surbhi-khanna-479258713.cms) [](https://www.google.com/preferences/source?q=economictimes "Google preferences in ET") [Follow us](https://www.whatsapp.com/channel/0029Vb6dOI1EKyZPPqpH7I0y)
ET Online
Last Updated: Oct 08, 2025, 12:22:19 PM IST
SHARE THIS NEWS

Section Title: Aditya Birla Sun Life Mutual Fund suspends fresh subscription in its 3 international funds
Content:
[Aditya Birla Sun Life Mutual Fund](https://economictimes.indiatimes.com/topic/aditya-birla-sun-life-mutual-fund) has suspended fresh subscriptions to its three [international funds](https://economictimes.indiatimes.com/topic/international-funds) effective 7 October 2025, informing unit holders via a notice-cum-addendum.
Tired of too many ads? Remove Ads
The three international funds include: [Aditya Birla Sun Life International Equity Fund](https://economictimes.indiatimes.com/topic/aditya-birla-sun-life-international-equity-fund) , Aditya Birla Sun Life Global Emerging Opportunities Fund, and Aditya Birla Sun Life Global Excellence Equity Fund of Fund.
 ... 
Section Title: Aditya Birla Sun Life Mutual Fund suspends fresh subscription in its 3 international funds
Content:
Further, no fresh registrations under systematic transactions, viz., Systematic Investment Plan (SIP) and Systematic Transfer Plan (STP), will be accepted, and no units will be allotted under SIP and STP falling on or after the effective date. However, for installments falling due under SIP/STP registered prior to the effective date, processing will continue under the respective plans/options of the schemes.
Tired of too many ads? Remove Ads
The fund house further stated that, in view of the above, relevant changes will be carried out in the SAI, SID, and KIM of the schemes. All other features, terms, and conditions of the SAI, SID, and KIM of the schemes of the fund will remain unchanged. This notice-cum-addendum forms an integral part of the SAI, SID, and KIM issued for the schemes, read together with the addenda issued thereunder.
Popular in MF

Section Title: Aditya Birla Sun Life Mutual Fund suspends fresh subscription in its 3 international funds
Content:
[Choice Mutual Fund to launch Choice Gold ETF, its maiden fund](https://m.economictimes.com/mf/mf-news/choice-mutual-fund-to-launch-choice-gold-etf-its-maiden-fund/articleshow/124383432.cms)
6.
[Aditya Birla Sun Life Mutual Fund suspends fresh subscription in its 3 international funds](https://m.economictimes.com/mf/mf-news/aditya-birla-sun-life-mutual-fund-suspends-fresh-subscription-in-its-3-international-funds/articleshow/124379463.cms)
In the same notice-cum-addendum, the fund house informed that the minimum instalment amount of Daily SIP availed through online mode and digital platforms is modified with effect from Wednesday, 8 October 2025. For Equity and Hybrid Schemes, the minimum instalment amount is Rs 10, and in multiples of Re 1 thereafter, whereas for Aditya Birla Sun Life Liquid Fund, the minimum instalment amount is Rs 30, and in multiples of Re 1 thereafter.
 ...

Section Title: ... > ### About Aditya Birla Sun Life Commodity Equities Fund Global Agri Plan Direct Growth
Content:
Aditya Birla Sun Life Commodity Equities Fund Global Agri Plan Direct Growth is a Equity Mutual Fund Scheme launched by Aditya Birla Sun Life Mutual Fund. This scheme was made available to investors on 23 Dec 1994. The fund currently has an Asset Under Management(AUM) of ₹4,35,493 Cr and the Latest NAV as of 28 Jul 2023 is ₹37.35.
The Aditya Birla Sun Life Commodity Equities Fund Global Agri Plan Direct Growth is rated Very High risk. Minimum SIP Investment is set to ₹1,000. 1% for redemption within 30 days
;
Section Title: ... > Investment Objective
Content:
The scheme will be investing in (1) stocks issued either in India (upto 35%) or overseas (atleast 65%) of specific commodity focused companies, and/or (2) overseas mutual fund schemes (upto 35%) having similar investment objectives. Scheme will be managed by investing in stocks that are also a part of the S&P Global Agribusiness Index.;
Fund benchmark S&P Global Agribusiness Total Return Index
[Scheme Information Document(SID)](https://mutualfund.adityabirlacapital.com)
